All Included Specific Parts to Check: All sprayed asbestos coatings used for fireproofing or insulation.
All insulation materials on pipes, boilers, or tanks.
All suspended ceiling tiles and panels.

Enduits projetés (sprayed coatings), revêtements durs (hard coverings like asbestos-cement plates), entourages de poteaux (column surrounds made of cardboard, asbestos-cement, sandwich materials, or cardboard+plaster), and coffrage perdu (permanent formwork).+1
Enduits projetés (sprayed coatings) and panneaux de cloisons (partition panels).+1

Dalles de sol (Floor tiles).
Conduits and enveloppes de calorifuges (insulation jackets/wraps).
Clapets (dampers), volets (shutters), and rebouchage (sealing/filling materials).
Joints including tresses (braided ropes) and bandes (strips).
Conduits.
Plaques (sheets), ardoises (slates), accessoires de couverture (composite or fiber-cement accessories), and bardeaux bitumineux (bituminous shingles).+2
Plaques (sheets), ardoises (slates), and panneaux (composite or fiber-cement panels).+1
Fiber-cement conduits for rainwater (eaux pluviales), waste water (eaux usées), and smoke/flue (conduits de fumée).+1
Revêtements bitumineux d'étanchéité (bituminous coatings), bardeaux d'asphalte/bitume (shingles), pare-vapeur (vapor barriers), and associated coatings and glues.+2
Rivets, faîtages (ridgings), and closoirs.+1
Panneaux-sandwichs (plates, assembly joints, braided ropes), bardages (fiber-cement sheets/bins, slates, insulation under siding), and fiber-cement window sills.
Found in walls, pillars, and structural interfaces.+1

Portes et cloisons palières (landing doors/walls), joints mousse (foam joints), flocage (sprayed coatings), bourre (packing/filler), and wall/floor interfaces.+1
